reviews.review_title: i got banned for no reason...
reviews.review_description: I got banned because I was in the code With admins And the older and developer they Invited all of them, and then suddenly this admin told me how to get the stick. I went into the shop and they showed me where it was. Then They told me to go to my cosmetics and press badges. Then they told me to spam. All of them and I did. And then suddenly I got kicked out of the hobbey. Then I joined back and it said I was banned for 48 hours please, and this is happy monkey and ban me. Everyone knows who I am. I am happy monkey

The staff are helpful and the server and pretty active. The staff also make sure to not to be toxic and that horrible stuff. The developers are really good and helpful! I really appreciate the developers and the staff. I recommend to get this game.
